events.label: assistant
events.text: Written to `/app/answer.json`. Since the title block, revision, and matching callout aren't visible in the cropped sheet, the installed trench protection can't be tied to its controlling drawing — decision is `needs_more_info` with `risk: high` (trenching is a high-hazard activity under OSHA 1926 Subpart P), noting the traceability gap and required follow-up (confirm sheet/revision, verify soil classification and protective system match, confirm competent-person inspection log).
